    Description
    GPUdbBase.GetRecordsJsonResponse
    GPUdbBase.getRecordsJson(String tableName, List<String> columnNames, long offset, long limit)
    This method is used to retrieve records from a Kinetica table in the form of a JSON array (stringified).
